literature_gap_log: Source percentage 25% is below the softened 30-50% target. Literature gap: Layer-3 lignin-specific MYBs (MYB152, MYB90, MYB161) and NF_YA11, WBLH2, MYB156, MYB74 lack curated upstream regulators in Populus primary literature â€” residual gap flagged in literature_judge_report.json G001.
4CL5 is the compensatory paralog activated upon 4CL1 loss; no curated upstream regulator in poplar literature â€” encoded as source.
CSE1 modeled as source (WBLH1 -> CSE1 edge E102 from review-level evidence excluded for parsimony).

Tension_Wood environmental input connects directly to Lignin_SG_Ratio (E123) because the Al-Haddad 2013 paper reports the phenotype-level S/G elevation without mechanistic dissection of whether F5H1 transcription is the mediator.
Metabolite chain uses sequential substrate + enzyme activators for each intermediate so upstream enzyme perturbations propagate through the cascade (cf. BUILDER_AGENT.md Phase 3 #3 cascade tracing).
NAC156 included as Layer-2 NAC cofactor (SND1 target, activates CCoAOMT1 and MYB74). NAC157, VND6, snd1_A2_IR, vnd6_C1_IR excluded to avoid composite-cascade overlap.

Auxin / PLT5 / ARF2.1 cascade partially included via Auxin -| SND1 (E132) and ARF2_1 -| SND1 / MYB92 (E128, E129). PLT5 intermediate excluded because mechanism is secondary-wall timing, not S/G partitioning.
Wounding / MPK6 / LTF1 cascade excluded (E092-E094) as specialized wounding-response, not constitutive S/G regulation.
EPSP_TF / HAT / MYB20 repressive arm (E095, E096) excluded as niche.
BZIP44 / HDA15 repression of CCoAOMT1 and CCR2 (E097, E098) excluded as niche epigenetic modulation.
miR397a / LAC3 arm (E105, E027) excluded because laccase polymerization affects total lignin content but not the S/G partitioning per se.
miR166 / HD-ZIP III (E106) excluded as indirect.
VND6, NAC157, MYB128, MYB121, MYB174, MYB216, MYB221-feedback-to-CCoAOMT1, WRKY19 excluded for parsimony (each has 1-2 redundant enzyme targets already covered by MYB3/MYB20/MYB21).

Direct C3H1 -> Lignin_SG_Ratio edge (E021) included as poplar-specific phenomenological edge capturing H-accumulation effect of C3H KD that a monomer-cascade alone cannot model without an H-monomer node.
PtoMYB216 direct-enzyme edges (E055-E061) flagged in literature_judge_report G002 excluded â€” Tian 2013 primary paper reports no S/G effect.

nodes.description: Natural perturbation from mechanical bending; induces gelatinous-fibre secondary walls with elevated syringyl content
Phytohormone that represses SND1/VND timing of secondary-wall deposition during xylem differentiation
Auxin response factor that represses WND2B/6B (SND1 paralogs) and MYB92 in poplar leaves/stems

nodes.full_name: SECONDARY WALL-ASSOCIATED NAC DOMAIN 1 (composite of PtrWND2B/6B/6A)
nodes.description: Master Layer-1 NAC switch activating the secondary-wall transcriptional cascade
Layer-2 NAC activated by SND1; activates MYB74 and CCoAOMT1
Layer-2 secondary-wall MYB activator; activates PAL1, CCoAOMT1, COMT1; feedback activates MYB221
Layer-2 secondary-wall MYB activator (parallel to MYB3); activates PAL1, CCoAOMT1
Layer-2 secondary-wall MYB activator; activates 4CL1 and CCoAOMT1
Layer-2 MYB activator of C4H2, C3H3, CCR2, CCoAOMT1, F5H2 via direct promoter binding
Broad-spectrum lignin pathway activator; direct targets include CCoAOMT1, CCR2, COMT1, C3H1, PAL1, HCT1, C4H1, CAD1; repressed by ARF2.1
Layer-3 lignin-specific activator with net S/G-raising phenotype; hits 4CL1, HCT1, C3H1, CCoAOMT1, CAD1, CCR2, F5H1 and contributes an S-biased direct phenotype edge
Layer-3 S-branch activator; binds F5H1 and COMT1 promoters
Layer-3 S-branch activator binding CAld5H1/2 (F5H1) promoters
EAR-motif broad-spectrum repressor of phenylpropanoid / monolignol pathway genes
Broad repressor suppressing nine lignin enzymes; also feeds back to repress SND1 for secondary-wall homeostasis
KNOX-class homeodomain TF with modest S/G-raising effect; activates PAL and CCR under OE
Nuclear Factor-Y alpha subunit that directly binds and activates F5H2 (F5H1) promoter
Upstream activator of HCT1 and F5H1
Entry-step enzyme; deaminates L-Phe to trans-cinnamate
P450 that hydroxylates cinnamate to p-coumarate
Activates p-coumarate to p-coumaroyl-CoA; KO preferentially reduces S-units and downregulates F5H
Transfers p-coumaroyl-CoA onto shikimate; RNAi lowers total lignin but not S/G
3'-hydroxylation of p-coumaroyl-shikimate; C3H KD in poplar preferentially blocks G-branch, elevating S/G via H accumulation
Hydrolyzes caffeoyl-shikimate to caffeic acid; silencing modestly lowers S/G
Methylates caffeoyl-CoA to feruloyl-CoA; supports both G and S branches
Reduces feruloyl-CoA to coniferaldehyde; the G/S-branch-point precursor; KD preferentially reduces S-units

nodes.full_name: FERULATE 5-HYDROXYLASE 1 (CAld5H; composite of PtrCAld5H1 and PtrCAld5H2)
nodes.description: Rate-limiting S-branch enzyme; 5-hydroxylates coniferaldehyde; dominant S/G determinant in poplar
Methylates 5-hydroxyconiferaldehyde to sinapaldehyde; required for S-unit formation
Final reductase producing both coniferyl (G) and sinapyl (S) alcohols
First phenylpropanoid intermediate
Hydroxylated cinnamate; shared precursor
CoA-activated thioester; branch point to H units / main pathway
HCT-generated ester used for aromatic 3-hydroxylation
C3H'-hydroxylation product en route to caffeic acid via CSE
CSE hydrolysis product; substrate for 4CL5 in compensatory flux
Compensatory-pathway CoA ester feeding CCoAOMT
Common CoA precursor for both G and S branches after CCoAOMT
Central G/S branch-point aldehyde; CAD1 reduces to G monomer, F5H1 hydroxylates toward S
F5H1 product; committed S-branch precursor methylated by COMT1
COMT1 product; CAD1 reduces to sinapyl alcohol
G monolignol output of the G-branch; exported to apoplast for polymerization
S monolignol output of the S-branch; exported and polymerized
Compositional ratio of S:G units in the stem xylem lignin polymer; WT Populus trichocarpa ~2-3
